title: How We Test VPN Services
description: Our comprehensive testing methodology for evaluating VPN services.
content:
We take VPN testing seriously. Our methodology has been refined over 5 years and hundreds of VPN reviews. Every VPN we review goes through an identical testing process.

## Testing Categories

### Speed Testing (25% of overall score)
We test download and upload speeds across servers in North America, Europe, and Asia using a 1 Gbps connection. Tests run at different times of day and across multiple protocols (WireGuard/NordLynx, OpenVPN).

### Privacy & Security (25% of overall score)
We verify encryption standards, examine privacy policies, check for data leaks (DNS, WebRTC, IPv6), and review third-party audit reports.

### Streaming & Unblocking (20% of overall score)
We test access to Netflix (US, UK, Canada, Japan), Hulu, BBC iPlayer, Disney+, and Amazon Prime Video from multiple server locations.

### Features & Usability (15% of overall score)
We evaluate the apps on Windows, Mac, iOS, and Android. Assessment includes installation ease, interface design, settings accessibility, and advanced features.

### Value (15% of overall score)
We calculate cost per feature, compare pricing across plan lengths, and factor in free trials and money-back guarantees.
